/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtest_detector__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libtest_detector__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/test_detector__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/test_detector/msg/detail/yolo_detection__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/apollo/build/test_detector:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libtest_detector__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
